title: ChatGPT Toolkit: Prompt Library Shortcut Experience Improvement
target_scope: Prompt Library Shortcut Area and Collapsible Main Panel

baseline.description: ChatGPT Toolkit main panel is always expanded. Prompt Library is a separate popup. No quick access to prompts in the main panel.

constraints: Must use shared data source with existing Prompt Library
Clicking title only copies content (Schema A)
Persistence of collapse state and sort preference
Maintain existing UI behavior when expanded
